expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":3},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Here's what you've actually got across all these pieces"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"I pulled it all together"},"children":["You weren't exaggerating — there are six distinct sources here, and together they form a pretty complete trip picture. Here's the inventory:"]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":3},"children":["🧾 What's in your material"]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"📋 tanzaniamemories.md — Your master notes"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A full trip dossier for you (Vasileios Kefallinos) & Athina Mari, Aug 3–20 2026. Covers multiple cities: Dar es Salaam, Arusha, Ngorongoro Crater safari, Zanzibar / Stone Town, and flights. Includes contacts (Richard at the safari office), accommodation names, and day-by-day plans."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"💰 trip-costs.xlsx — Your budget spreadsheet"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Cost breakdown across the whole trip — flights, accommodation, safari, park fees, transfers, everything with figures. This is your financial picture."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"🏞️ ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf — Official park fees"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The official Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff document — entry fees, vehicle fees, ranger fees, everything the authority charges. This is the ground-truth on what the crater costs."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"📸 stone-town-zanzibar.jpg — Your photo"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A striking courtyard shot in Stone Town, Zanzibar — white stucco, dark wooden balconies, Moorish/Spanish style. A memory you wanted to keep."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"🎙️ Voice memo from the crater"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["On-the-ground details the files don't capture: your guide ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel"]}," (not Richard), two Maasai bracelets for Athina Mari (~TZS 35,000 / ~$20-25), an ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["extra ranger tip at the gate"]}," of ~TZS 5,000 cash (separate from park fees!), and a reminder to ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["ask Richard about that before the safari balance payment"]},"."]}]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Here's the thing:"]}," you've got dates, costs, official rules, personal memories, people's names, and to-dos — spread across files, photos, and audio — and you need to be able to pull up any piece of it on your phone while standing at the gate in Ngorongoro. That's exactly the kind of tangle an app can fix."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I could build you ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["a single place you can open on your phone"]}," — your itinerary, all the costs, the park fees for reference, the photo, the voice-memo details, and the reminders (like asking Richard about the ranger tip). One tap, everything you need, no digging through attachments."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Want me to put this together for you?"]}]}]}

errors.message: Property 'error' does not exist on type '{ ok: boolean; facts: Record<string, unknown>; }'.
errors.statement:
const summary = r.ok
  ? keys.length === 0
    ? 'No facts stored yet.'
    : `Found ${keys.length} fact(s): ${keys.map(k => `${k}=${typeof facts[k] === 'string' ? `"${facts[k]}"` : JSON.stringify(facts[k])}`).join(', ')}`
  : `Error recalling facts: ${r.error || 'unknown'}`;

// Parse the legs sheet
